channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The death of sportswriting
item.description: With the closure of the Washington Post sports section, sports journalism lost one of its last crown jewels, and one of media's most prestigious profe...

item.title: Netanyahu to hold urgent meeting with Trump Wednesday amid Iran negotiations
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has moved up his visit to Washington and is expected to meet with President Trump on Wednesday to discuss th...

item.title: More people are treating themselves to a solo meal
item.description: Solo dining orders have soared since 2021, according to a report by one of the world's largest restaurant companies. Why it matters: Eating alone does...

item.title: America's 250th anniversary collides with a renewed fight over Black history
item.description: America's 250th anniversary is colliding with a renewed battle over Black history, just as the White House moves to both smooth over and narrow how ra...

item.title: Zelensky says Trump wants Russia-Ukraine peace deal by June, before midterms focus
item.description: The U.S. wants Russia and Ukraine to sign a peace deal that ends the war by June, before President Trump pivots to focusing his energy on the midterm ...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Vance tries to thread affordability needle in Rust Belt
item.description: The vice president fine-tunes Trump’s economic message, but he's only got so much wiggle room.

item.title: Ex-Trump voters swung hard to Democrats over costs in NJ & VA, new research shows
item.description: Voters who backed Donald Trump in 2024 and swung to Democrats in this year's Virginia and New Jersey elections did so over economic concerns, accordin...

item.title: CNN Wonders Why ICE Is Targeting Charlotte, N.C. Here’s Why.
item.description: ICE targets Charlotte, North Carolina due to the city’s mounting immigration problem. It is also the seat of Mecklenburg County which permits the sher...

item.title: Deterring Illegal Immigration: This Town Decided that Actions Speak Louder than Words
item.description: After approving an anti-sanctuary resolution, Worthington Hills, Kentucky is not a sanctuary for illegal aliens. To read the rest of the article click...

item.title: Chicago Mayor Dodges Question by Quibbling Over Term “Illegal Alien”
item.description: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson is happy to spend hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars on benefits and services for illegal aliens. What he does not...

item.title: Gavin Newsom: What’s Three Lives and Another $200 Million Anyway?
item.description: In just the last two months, illegal aliens operating big rigs with California commercial driver’s licenses have cost six innocent motorists their liv...

item.title: DHS Launches Operation River Wall to Secure Rio Grande Valley
item.description: DHS’s Operation River Wall will surge U.S. Coast Guard assets to waterways at our southern border to target illegal immigration, transnational crimina...
